positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for james_lunch_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u29,axiom,
    at_company_today(james)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    is_manager(james)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    has_lunch_at_home(X0) | has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    ~works_remotely_from_home(james)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~is_manager(X0) | ~works_remotely_from_home(X0)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    works_remotely_from_home(X0) | has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_at_home(X0) | works_remotely_from_home(X0)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    has_lunch_in_company(james)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_in_company(X0) | schedules_meeting_with_customers(X0)).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    schedules_meeting_with_customers(james)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~schedules_meeting_with_customers(X0) | at_company_today(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~has_lunch_at_home(X0) | ~has_lunch_in_company(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define in_other_countries(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
